name: PER_LDAP_REQUESTS
description: Table for storing one record per OIM request made by the calling system.

columns.Name: LDAP_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Mandatory Primary Key Updatable While New Key Generation

columns.Name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to identify if the request is active and therefore either due to be processed or in progress within the SOA composite

columns.Name: REQUESTING_PRODUCT
columns.Comments: The product performing the LDAP requesting (HCM or TCA)

columns.Name: REQUESTING_REFERENCE_ID
columns.Comments: The Person Id of the requesting product is HCM. The Party Id if the requesting product is TCA

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUESTOR_USER_GUID
columns.Comments: The user Guid of the user who is making the LDAP request (if available)

columns.Name: REQUEST_STATUS
columns.Comments: The current status of the request: REQUEST, IN PROGRESS, COMPLETE, PART-COMPLETE

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ACTION_OCCURRENCES.

columns.Name: REQUEST_DATE
columns.Comments: The date that the request should be or was processed.

columns.Name: LDAP_POLICY_FILE
columns.Comments: The name of the policy file that should be used to process this request

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ERROR_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Displayed error that comes back from OIM

columns.Name: ERROR_CODE
columns.Comments: Error code that corresponds to MESSAGE_NAME attribute from the FND_MESSAGES table

columns.Name: SOD_ERROR_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Segregation of duties error description

columns.Name: REQUESTING_SOURCE
columns.Comments: REQUESTING_SOURCE- INTERNAL or EXTERNAL
